summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Akre Focus ETF (AKRE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation by investing in US firms with high returns, management focused on investor relations, and growth potential. The fund aims to buy these stocks at modest to reasonable valuations. AKRE was launched on Oct 27, 2025 and is issued by Akre.

data.title: Real Assets or Active ETFs? Where RIAs Allocate
data.text: Registered investment advisors did not pull back on exchange-traded funds in the first quarter of 2026. They kept adding them, according to AdvizorPro's Q1 2026 Quarterly RIA ETF Trends Report.

holdings.infoBox: AKRE is an equity ETF with a total of 21 individual holdings. The top holdings are Mastercard stock at 13.80%, Constellation Software at 12.32%, Brookfield at 7.74%, Moody's at 7.45%, and Visa Inc. at 7.30%.
